winners.quote: The jury got it wrong — they voted out [The Chaos Agent] instead of the real threat. But I'm not appealing this verdict. As far as I'm concerned, justice was served... just not the kind the village was expecting.

losers.quote: It's fascinating how quickly trust can shift when you don't know your own reflection anymore. I watched [The Underdog] take my place, and the room never saw it coming — sometimes the quietest transitions are the most devastating.

My gut told me [The Chaos Agent] was off, and look — they got voted out! But that's not what I wanted. I was trying to get MYSELF kicked, and somehow I still can't lose right. Next time, I'm just gonna be louder.

The posterior probability of [The Chaos Agent] being a wolf was never high enough to justify that execution — we voted out our <Seer> on unquantified vibes. The data said one thing; the room voted on another. That's the variance you can't model out.
